_comment: Tuned against the Android OguriTB profile's settings (Speed/Power/Wit priority, rainbow bonus on) and the audit findings (Stamina 518 < 550 default long-distance floor was penalizing late-game G1 longs). v6.6 NOTE: targetOptionalRaceCount was REMOVED because the solver only uses it for an after-the-fact diagnostic warning, NOT for actual race-count optimization. The real levers for race density are epithetValue, raceCostPct, and lateSeniorRacePressure -- those are now tuned aggressively. Oguri's auto-picked signature 'Ideal Idol' requires winning Mile Championship + Yasuda Kinen + Arima Kinen, so the solver gets epithetValue=3.0 per hit on those.

4._comment: Trackblazer scenario 4. epithetValue 3.0 = 3x default pull on Ideal Idol's required G1 wins. raceCostPct 75 lowers the per-race cost threshold so more middling races become net-positive (default 100 is 'only race for epithets'). lateSeniorRacePressure 20 (default 12) pushes more racing in turns 65-72. distancePreferenceBonus 12 (default 6) further rewards Mile/Medium picks. longDistanceStaminaFloor 450 = down from 550 since Oguri's Stamina aptitude is B not S/A. NOTE: targetOptionalRaceCount intentionally absent -- it's a no-op in the solver math, only used for warning notes.
